widgets_values:
💡 SEAMLESS UPSCALING
Hier passiert die Magie für die Nahtlosigkeit: Das Bild wird hochskaliert und durch den StarImageShifter verschoben, um harte Kanten am Rand zu eliminieren.

💡 INPUT & PROMPTING
This is where the source image is loaded. Ollama prepares the prompt specifically for a 360° panorama, while the StarWildcards insert dynamic details.

💡 BASE GENERATION
The Krea2 model generates the 360° base draft here.

💡 HIGH-RES DETAILS
Two different VAE/upscale paths (Normal & Tiled/SeedVR). Tiled decoding prevents VRAM issues with extreme panorama resolutions.

💡 POST-PROCESSING & EXPORT
Finally, film grain and a depth map (DepthAnything) are generated. The finished panorama is saved via the Star-Save-Nodes.

seamless equirectangular 360 degree panorama, a wide-angle scene of flower hills at sunset, filled with numerous funny fluffy purple otters featuring dark purple and white fur with distinct purple mohawk hairstyles and glowing golden stars on their chests; a massive sea monster lurks deep beneath the surface, its colossal power crushing ships below. In the foreground, three specific otters are positioned prominently, each holding a sign: "STARNODES UPDATE 2.1.0", "NEW PANORAMA NODES!", and "WORKFLOW INCLUDED!". The scene includes a Sunda Leopard Cat, set in a high-quality octane render with extreme detail, featuring a perfectly wrapped horizon where every element flows into the seamless environment, exhibiting pinched zenith and nadir points.,
masterpiece, best quality, highres, photography, 8k, hq, high details

a high detailed 360 panorama of a wide angle scene in the flower hills at sunset.
everywhere there are funny fluffy purple (dark purple and white with purple mohawk hair style) otters playing with golden stars on their chests.
3 otters are more in the foreground each one of them is holding a sign with text on it.
